note_text:
*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Right buttock / Measures 1.2 cm x 1.5 cm / Stage: Stage 2
Drainage present - serous, light. Odor present. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right buttock wound site, rates 8/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 2 pressure ulcer Right buttock measures 1.2 cm x 1.5 cm x 0.1 cm.
  Wound bed: 75% slough, 25% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: light. Odor: none.
Assessment: Stage 2 pressure ulcer Right buttock — improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Foam dressing change daily.
